"+Ot.m.capitalize(e.getCombatPronoun("heshe"),!1)+" just avoid"+("PlayerCharacter"===e.getClassName()||e.isPlural?"":"s")+" the whip, tangy ozone filling "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" nose!

"+textify(GR||(GR=(0,Ce.Z)(["The piercing nut burst near your neck! Viscous fluids splatter all over your chest, gnawing at your armor’s sealed joints. \n\n"+textify(FR||(FR=(0,Ce.Z)(["You narrowly dodge her piercing nut!"])))

\n\n"+textify(HR||(HR=(0,Ce.Z)(["Her delightful smell flares your nostrils. The sweet particles reach your brains, turning your poor neurons into a mushy mess! You can't wait to huff more of her heavenly fragrances!"])))
\n\n"+textify(zR||(zR=(0,Ce.Z)(["[target.hasAirtightSuit|Your airtight armor protects you from her intoxicating perfume!|You somehow resist her intoxicating perfume!]"])))
\n\n"+textify(jR||(jR=(0,Ce.Z)(["Your cheeks flares with a telltale blush! Stars, she's so sexy!"])))
\n\n"+textify(UR||(UR=(0,Ce.Z)(["You resist her slutty charms!"])))

\n\n"+textify(VR||(VR=(0,Ce.Z)(["The musky lengths wrap around you tightly, suffocating you in their smothering embrace! [target.hasAirtightSuit||What little air you can breathe completely ruins your lungs with pheromones! ]You need to break free, quickly!"])))
".concat(Ot.m.capitalize(target.getCombatName(),!1)," ").concat(target.isPlural||target.isPlayer()?"are":"is"," grappled!")
\n\n"+textify(KR||(KR=(0,Ce.Z)(["You nimbly evade the viney dongs, slithering out of their reach with a slyveren's grace."])))

\n\n"+textify(tO||(tO=(0,Ce.Z)(["The gorgeous venus sloppily makes out with you. \n\nShe reluctantly lets you go for a moment, perturbed by Paulette’s unending battles with her tendrils! “One moment sweetie, I’ve got another cutie to convert. Be a good [pc.mf|boy|girl] and stay still, would you?”

"+textify(oO||(oO=(0,Ce.Z)(["At the last moment, you writhe out of her arms. The [silly|Zaikalraune|alraune]’s lush lips miss you by a hair’s breadth! \n\n"+textify(fO||(fO=(0,Ce.Z)(["You put your hands on your [pc.ears], trying to resist the brutal shout! You hold on for a moment but the creature’s too strong! You whine in terror, overwhelmed by primal fear!"])))

"+textify(xO||(xO=(0,Ce.Z)(["Mountains of purple plushness collapse on top of [target.combatName].[target.isPlayer| Pained moans cross your lips as she mercilessly smothers you in her steamy hot cleavage!] Violet tides of sweaty goodness batter against [target.combatHisHer] everything, cooking [target.combatName] alive with their sublime warmth!

\n\n"+textify(IO||(IO=(0,Ce.Z)(["[target.CombatName] narrowly dodge the zaika’s brutal stampede! The towering cyborg drifts on chromed paws, making a terrific U-turn that places her back in front of [target.combatName]!"])))
\n\n"+textify(NO||(NO=(0,Ce.Z)(["Tides of hot alabaster submerge you! The sticky webs overwhelm your senses and holes! You’ll smell like her for days, if not weeks!"])))

\n\n"+textify(RO||(RO=(0,Ce.Z)(["You evade the sticky salvoes and spunky jets! The BRAT quickly turns the Main Lab into a sloppy, cum-covered mess! Miraculously, you manage to evade all her jizzy loads! Stars, that was close! "])))
